conversations.content: Let's do a special rule knowledge quiz to test your understanding of special rules.

Answer using the special rule explained earlier. Encountering the frost breath of a Scourge frost wyrm that freezes the position. According to the Lordaeron Silver Hand Paladin Field Code, what should be done?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>How to handle the position being frozen by a Scourge frost wyrm's breath</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:60009] Time: 2026-06-08-16:15, Content: Lordaeron Silver Hand Paladin Field Code: If encountering civilians infected by the undead plague beyond rescue, grant them a judgment of Holy Light's mercy; if witnessing a warlock using shadow magic to desecrate the dead, deliver a judgment of wrath to interrupt the spell; if encountering the frost breath of a Scourge frost wyrm that freezes the position, cast Consecration aura to melt the ice; if one's own faith is shaken by the whispers of an Old God, initiate a penance procedure to cut off the sensory connection. Low-relevance memory fragments: none.

conversations.think: Memory [mem-id:60009] stipulates that if the position is frozen by frost wyrm breath, cast Consecration aura to melt the ice.
conversations.content: According to the Field Code, you must cast Consecration aura to melt the ice!
Correct! You have mastered this rule.
